GameConditionDef.label: aphrodisiac psychic wave
GameConditionDef.description: A highly concentrated hormonal or psychic energy wave is pulsing across the local grid. Sleeping humanoids are suffering sudden, messy chemical overflows every few hours.
GameConditionDef.letterText: A strange pink mist or energy wave settles over the area...

li.label: vivid midnight fantasy
li.description: That dream felt so incredibly real... honestly, waking up is a bit depressing, but I'm still riding the high.

HediffDef.label: dream-world standards
HediffDef.description: This pawn experienced an extraordinarily perfect intimate encounter in their sleep. Real life interactions feel deeply underwhelming by comparison right now.
